reviews: This blender is fantastic! It handles ice and frozen fruit with ease. Super quiet motor too.
Build quality feels cheap. The lid cracked after two weeks of normal use.
Great value for the price. Not the most powerful but does the job for smoothies.
Returned it immediately. Leaked all over my counter the first time I used it.
My mom loves it! Easy to clean and the buttons are simple enough for her to use.
Decent product. Wish the cord was longer. Also a bit loud but nothing unbearable.
Five stars. Does exactly what it says. No complaints after 6 months of daily use.
The motor burned out after 3 months. Customer support was unhelpful.
Looks great on the counter. Performance is average but the design is sleek.
Not worth the money. Cheaper alternatives work just as well.
